info.title: dotnet-ilverify
info.description:
ILVerify tool. 
When using NuGet 3.x this package requires at least version 3.4.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: reference
options.description: Reference metadata from the specified assembly

options.name: include
options.description: Use only methods/types/namespaces, which match the given regular expression(s)

options.name: include-file
options.description: Same as --include, but the regular expression(s) are declared line by line in the specified file.

options.name: exclude
options.description: Skip methods/types/namespaces, which match the given regular expression(s)

options.name: exclude-file
options.description: Same as --exclude, but the regular expression(s) are declared line by line in the specified file.

options.name: ignore-error
options.description: Ignore errors, which match the given regular expression(s)

options.name: ignore-error-file
options.description: Same as --ignore-error, but the regular expression(s) are declared line by line in the specified file.

options.name: tokens
options.description: Include metadata tokens in error messages
